scripts.build: npm run generate && astro build && npm run postprocess:reader-copy && npm run generate-sw
scripts.garden:query:smoke: node scripts/garden-query.mjs --help >/dev/null && node scripts/garden-query.mjs --topic product-truth --format ids
scripts.inspect:packet:smoke: node scripts/inspect-packet.mjs --article agent-auditable-research --format json >/dev/null && node scripts/inspect-packet.mjs --source source-agentic-publications-2025 --format markdown >/dev/null && node scripts/inspect-packet.mjs --graph-slice article:agent-auditable-research --format json >/dev/null
scripts.check: npm run generate && npm run validate && npm run check:series && astro build && npm run postprocess:reader-copy && npm run generate-sw && npm run validate:build && npm run garden:query:smoke && npm run eval:briefs && npm run inspect:packet:smoke && npm run agent:tools:smoke && npm run verify -- --fail-on-draft && npm run audit -- --check
